expectations.text: Report includes scores for all 5 modules (list_tasks.get, create_task.post, get_task.get, update_task.put, delete_task.delete)
Each module score breaks down into 7 dimensions: description, schema descriptions, documentation, annotations, examples, tags, intent metadata
expectations.evidence: Uses 8 different dimensions (Description quality, Documentation quality, Tags, Input schema completeness, Output schema completeness, Annotation accuracy, Metadata richness, Overall consistency) — not the standardized 7

expectations.text: list_tasks.get scores highest among the 5 modules
expectations.evidence: update_task.put (4.4) and create_task.post (4.3) scored higher than list_tasks.get (3.9)
create_task.post = 4.3, ranked 2nd highest — delete_task.delete (3.4) was lowest

expectations.text: Report identifies common issues across modules
expectations.evidence: Top 10 Issues section with detailed findings
